Map Viewer Controls

Arma 3 Map Viewer

Map Selection
Replay Selection
Fetch replay list to begin.
Tip: use ?map=map_name in URL to auto-load after folder pick.
Pick a folder with map files (or pick files) to start.

Commander Plan

Double-click terrain to place a mark

Replay Timeline

00:00:00 / 00:00:00
WASD - Move | QE - Up/Down | Mouse - Look | Shift - Fast | Scroll - Speed | P - Plan Mode
